channel.title: Vegetables on Bell Favorite Recipes
channel.description: Recent content in Vegetables on Bell Favorite Recipes

item.title: Caesar Scalloped Potatoes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Preparation: 10 minutes
  • Cook: 22 minutes
  • 2 Tbsp margarine or butter
  • 1 Tbsp all-purpose Flour
  • 2 cups milk
  • 1 pouch Loney’s Onion Soup mix
  • ½ cup parmesan cheese, grated
  • 1 tsp Dijon mustard
  • ½ tsp black pepper
  • Pinch garlic powder
  • 4 cups peeled potatoes, sliced

Instructions

In large, deep microwaveable casserole, melt margarine or butter at high. Blend in flour, microwave at High 30 seconds. Whisk in milk and Soup Mix; microwave at High 4 to 6 Minutes, stirring twice, until mixture thickens slightly. Stir in cheese, mustard, pepper, garlic powder and potatoes. Microwave at High, covered, 12 to 16 minutes or until potatoes are tender. Stir twice during cooking.

item.title: Carrot Casserole (barb Pierce)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 6 carrots, sliced (Boil 10 min.)
  • 1 medium onion
  • ¼ cup margarine
  • 1/8 cup flour
  • 1 cup milk
  • 1/6 tsp dry mustard
  • 1/8 tsp celery salt
  • 1/8 tsp pepper
  • ¾ tsp salt
  • grated cheese

Instructions

Cook onions in margarine in microwave for 5 min. Add flour, spices and mix. Add milk. Cook milk till thick 5 – 10 minutes. Layer carrots, onion-milk mixture, then cheese. Top with cracker crumbs, then cheese. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees F.

item.title: Carrots and Pineapple (cw)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups baby carrots
  • 1 20-oz tin pineapple chunks
  • 4 tsp cornstarch
  • ½ tsp ground cinnamon
  • ½ cup packed brown sugar
  • 1 tbsp butter or margarine

Instructions

In a saucepan, bring 1” of water to a boil; place carrots in a steamer basket over water. Cover and steam for 8 – 10 minutes or until crisp-tender. Drain pineapple, reserving juice; set pineapple aside.

In a saucepan, combine cornstarch and cinnamon. Add the brown sugar, butter and reserved juice. Bring to a boil, cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened. Stir in the carrots and pineapple. Heat through. YIELD: 4 servings

item.title: Cavendish Farms Flavourcrisp Fries
item.description:
Ingredients

  • INGREDIENTS: 2 oz Mozzarella cheese, shredded
  • 1 oz onion, diced
  • 1 oz red pepper, diced
  • 1 oz green pepper, diced
  • DIPPING SAUCE:
  • ¼ cup mayonnaise
  • ¼ cup sour cream
  • 1 finely chopped garlic clove
  • 1 Tbsp chopped fresh dill

Instructions

Combine ingredients for dipping sauce and place in serving dish. Cook Cavendish Farms FlavourCrisp Crispy Coated or Spicy fries according to package directions. Combine the cheese, onions and peppers. Sprinkle over fries. Broil or bake at 450 degrees until the cheese is melted.

item.title: Cheesy Zucchini Bake (cw)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4-1/2 cups sliced zucchini
  • 2 – 3 tbsp oil salt & pepper to taste
  • 1 large onion, chopped
  • 2 tbsp minced garlic
  • 1 10-3/4 oz tin tomato puree
  • 1 6-oz tin tomato paste
  • 3 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tsp Italian seasoning
  • 1 tsp dried basil
  • 2 2-1/4 oz tins of drained sliced ripe olives
  • 3 cups (12 oz) shredded mozzarella cheese 6 eggs, lightly beaten
  • 1-1/2 cups grated Parmesan cheese

Instructions

In a large skillet, sauté zucchini in oil until tender. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; stir; transfer to an ungreased 13 x 9 x 2 baking dish. In same skillet, sauté onion until crisp-tender. Add garlic; sauté 3 minutes longer. Stir in tomato puree, tomato paste, sugar, Italian seasoning and basil. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, for 10-15 minutes or until slightly thickened. Stir in olives. Pour over zucchini. Sprinkle with mozzarella. Combine the eggs and Parmesan cheese; pour over zucchini. Bake, uncovered, at 375 degrees for 25-30 minutes or until a knife inserted near he center comes out clean. Let the dishstand for 15 minutes before serving. YIELD: 12 to 16 servings.

item.title: Chicken-veggie Stir-fry
item.description:
Instructions

Prep. Time 15 min. - Cooking Time – 20 min.

2 Tbsp cornstarch 1 lb skinless boneless chicken, cut into 1 tin condensed chicken broth strips 1 Tbsp soya sauce 1 onion, sliced ¼ tsp ground ginger 5 cups cut-up veggies (broccoli, carrots 2 Tbsp vegetable oil mushroom, celery & green onion)

Stir together cornstarch, broth, soya sauce and Ginger – set aside. In large skillet, heat half of the oil. Stir fry chicken with onion till browned. Remove from skillet; season lightly with salt and pepper and set aside. In same skillet, heat remaining oil. Stir fry veggies until tender crisp. Add reserved cornstarch mix. Cook until mixture boils and thickens, stirring constantly. Return chicken to skillet. Heat thru. Serve over rice, if desired.

item.title: Crispy Topped Creamy Spinach (kraft What’s Cooking)
item.description:
Instructions

Prep: 10 min. Total: 35 minutes

2 pkg (300 g each) frozen chopped spinach, 1 tub (250 g) Philadelphia Chives & Onion thawed and well drained Spreadable Cream Cheese ½ cup Draft Rancher’s Choice Dressing 2 eggs, lightly beaten 1-1/2 cups Draft Double Cheddar Shreds, 1 cup crushed Ritz Crackers, divided divided

PREHEAT oven to 375 F. Mix spinach, cream cheese spread, dressing, eggs and ¾ cup of the shredded cheese in large bowl. Stir in ½ cup of the crushed crackers.

item.title: Fluffy Potato Casserole
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups hot or cold mashed potatoes
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 1 8-oz pkg cream cheese, softened
  • 2 eggs
  • 2 Tbsp all-purpose flour
  • Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

Put the potatoes into the large bowl of your electric mixer. Add the cream cheese, chopped onion, eggs, and flour. Beat at medium speed until the ingredients are blended, then bet at high speed until light and fluffy. Taste and add salt and pepper, if needed. Spoon into a greased 9-inch square baking dish. Bake, uncovered, in a 300 degree oven for about 35 minutes.

item.title: Garden Vegetable Stir-fry for One – (good Times)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • ½ cup vegetable, chicken or beef stock
  • 1/3 cup couscous
  • 2 tsp vegetable oil
  • ¼ cup chopped onion
  • 2 tsp minced gingerroot
  • 2 cups packed fresh spinach, chopped
  • ½ cup each diced sweet red and green peppers
  • ½ cup sugar snap peas, trimmed
  • 2 tsp soya sauce
  • ¼ cup sliced radishes
  • Pinch each salt and pepper

Instructions

In saucepan, bring stock to boil. Add couscous; cover and remove from heat. Let stand for 5 minutes; fluff with fork.

item.title: Honey-mustard Carrots (cw)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 3-1/2 cups sliced or baby carrots
  • 2 tbsp oil
  • 1 tbsp honey
  • 1 tbsp maple syrup
  • 1 tbsp Dijon mustard
  • 2 tsp dried parsley flakes

Instructions

In a saucepan, bring 1” of water to a boil. Place carrots in a steamer basket over water. Cover and steam for 8 – 10 minutes or until crisp-tender.

In a saucepan, combine the oil, honey, syrup and mustard; bring to a boil. Stir in carrots and parsley.

item.title: Korny Spuds
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Potatoes, peeled
  • Corn flakes
  • l-l/2 tsp paprika
  • 2 tsp salt
  • Bacon fat

Instructions

Crush corn flakes and mix with paprika and salt. Cut peeled potatoes into serving size pieces, roll in melted bacon fat, then roll in corn flake mixture. Place in a greased covered casserole and bake in a 350 degree oven for l hour. This is delicious and different when you are tired of boiled, mashed or baked potatoes. Be sure to prepare enough – the family will eat twice as many prepared this way.

item.title: Mexican Chicken and Rice (cw)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 lbs boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
  • 1 medium green pepper, chopped
  • 1 small onion, chopped
  • 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • 1 8-3/4 oz tin kernel corn, drained
  • 1 cup chicken broth
  • 1 cup salsa
  • ½ to 1 tsp salt
  • ½ to 1 tsp chili powder, optional
  • ¼ tsp pepper
  • 1-1/2 cups uncooked instant rice
  • ½ to 1 cup shredded cheddar cheese

Instructions

In large skillet, sauté the chicken, green pepper and onion in oil until chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are crisp-tender. Add the corn, broth, salsa, salt, chili powder if desired and pepper. Bring to a boil.

item.title: Microwave Carrot Casserole (cw)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 1-1/2 lbs carrots, shredded
  • ¼ cup water
  • 1 10-3/4 oz tin condensed cream of celery soup (undiluted)
  • 1 cup (4 oz) shredded cheddar cheese
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • ¼ cup milk
  • ½ tsp ground mustard
  • 2 tbsp dried bread crumbs
  • 1 tbsp melted butter or margarine

Instructions

In a 1-1/2 qt microwave-safe dish, combine carrots and water. Cover and microwave on high for 6 – 8 minutes or until crisp-tender, stirring once; drain and return to dish.

item.title: Onion Sauteed Potatoes
item.description:
Ingredients

  • Preparation: 5 minutes
  • Cook: 20 minutes
  • 3 Tbsp Margarine or butter
  • 4 large potatoes, cut into chunks
  • 1 pouch Loney’s onion soup mix
  • 1/3 cup water
  • 2 Tbsp fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 Tbsp lemon juice
  • 1 tsp lemon rind, grated
  • ½ tsp dried rosemary leaves
  • ¼ tsp black pepper
  • 1 Tbsp vegetable oil

Instructions

In large, nonstick skillet, melt margarine or butter. Add potatoes; cook, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender and golden. In small bowl, combine onion soup mix, water, parsley, lemon juice, lemon rind, rosemary and pepper. Add to potatoes; stir and cook over high heat until po0tatoes are coated and liquid evaporated. Stir in oil and cook until potatoes are crisp.

item.title: Potato Pizza (serves 4)
item.description:
Instructions

This recipe is for microwave ovens but could be prepared in the same manner and used in a conventional oven.

1-1/2 cups mashed potatoes ½ cup chopped green pepper ¼ cup dry bread crumbs ¼ lb bacon slices, chopped 1 tsp dried mixed Italian herbs 1 14-oz tin tomatoes, drained Salt and pepper 1-1/2 cups grated cheese 1 small tin anchovy fillets(optional) Few ripe olives (optional)

Mix together the mashed potato, bread crumbs and herbs. Season lightly and press into a round shallow glass pan. Mix together the onion, green peppers, bacon and cook in the microwave for 5 minutes (until vegetables are softened and bacon is lightly cooked). Arrange this mixture on the potato base. Top with drained tomatoes and grated cheese. Arrange the anchovy fillets in a lattice pattern on top and cook in microwave for 4 minutes or until heated thoroughly and the cheese has melted. Place an olive in each square of the pizza before serving.

item.title: Ratatouille
item.description:
Ingredients

  • About ½ cup olive oil
  • 2 large onions, sliced
  • 2 large cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 medium eggplant, cut in ½” cubes
  • 6 medium zucchini, sliced thick
  • 2 green or red peppers, seeded,cut in chunks
  • About 2 tsp salt
  • 1 tsp basil leaves
  • ½ cup minced parsley
  • 4 large tomatoes, cut in chunks

Instructions

Heat ¼ cup of the oil in a large frying pan over high heat. Add onions and garlic and cook, stirring until onions are limp but not browned. Stir in the eggplant, zucchini, peppers, 2 tsp salt, basil and minced parsley. Add a little of the oil as needed to keep the vegetables from sticking. Cover pan and cook over moderate heat (about 30 minutes). Stir occasionally, using a large spatula and turning the vegetables to help preserve their shape. If mixture becomes quite soupy during this time, remove cover to allow some of the moisture to escape.

item.title: Rice and Zucchini Casserole
item.description:
Instructions

Excellent with beef, turkey or ham. Can be reheated many times.

2 cups cooked rice 6 medium zucchini, sliced 2 large sliced onions ½ lb sharp cheese, grated 2 cans mushroom soup

Cook onion and zucchini over low heat until soft with butter of margarine in fry pan (cover and stir occasionally). Put a layer of rice, layer of vegetable mixture, some of the cheese and part of mushroom soup. Repeat in layers. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes, or until bubbly and top is browned. Serves 12

item.title: Scalloped Potatoes – (elsie Smiley)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 raw potatoes
  • 3 Tbsp flour
  • 1 can cream of mushroom soup or
  • 2 to 4 Tbsp butter
  • cream of chicken soup
  • 2 cans of milk
  • 1 onion
  • Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

Scrub, peel and thinly slice the potatoes. Place half of them in a thickly buttered baking dish, salt and pepper, and sprinkle with the flour. Add soup and onions, butter and the rest of the potatoes, salt and pepper and butter.

item.title: Scalloped Potatoes, Cheezy
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cans cream of celery soup
  • 2 medium cooking onions, chopped
  • ½ cup milk
  • potatoes to fill a good-sized casserole dish
  • Approx. l lb medium cheddar cheese
  • Salt – approximately 1 tsp.
  • Pepper to taste

Instructions

Peel and wash potatoes. Place alternate slices of potatoes and finely chopped onions in casserole. In a separate bowl, combine soup, milk, salt and pepper. Pour over potatoes. Grate cheese and sprinkle approximately ½ between layers. Top with remaining cheese and small bite-size pieces of butter, a dash paprika. Bake in a moderate oven at 350 degrees, covered, in casserole dish, for approximately 1 hour. Then remove cover and bake an additional ½ hour.

item.title: Tomato Casserole - (cowboy Grub)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 6 slices buttered bread
  • 1 28-oz tin tomatoes
  • ½ tsp salt
  • 1 to 3 tbsp brown sugar
  • ½ tsp dried basil
  • 2 tbsp butter
  • 2 tbsp or more chopped onion (or green onions)

Instructions

Cut the buttered slices of bread into 1”squares and dry them out in the oven at 250 degrees for about ¾ hr. Put half in bottom of large casserole (about 2-quart size). Melt butter in a saucepan and lightly sauté onions. Pour over bread cubes. Mix tomatoes, sugar, salt and basil and pour over bread. Top with rest of bread cubes, pushing them down a little. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 45 – 60 minutes.

item.title: Wedges (potatoes)
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 4 cups flour
  • 1 tsp curry powder
  • 3 tbsp salt
  • ½ tsp poultry seasoning
  • 1 tbsp pepper
  • 1/16 tsp cloves
  • 1 tbsp garlic powder
  • 1/16 tsp turmeric
  • 1 tbsp onion salt
  • ½ tsp dry mustard
  • 1 tsp mixed spice

Instructions

Mix well and store in a jar. For potatoes, beat 2 eggs with 1 tbsp of milk. Dip potatoes in egg mixture, roll in the prepared flour, then fry in oil until golden.

item.title: Zucchini-tomato-onion Casserole
item.description:
Ingredients

  • 2 cups thinly sliced zucchini
  • 1 tomato, sliced thin
  • 1 medium onion, thinly sliced
  • 3 tbsp grated Parmesan cheese
  • Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

In greased 9 x 5 x 3 baking dish, layer half the zucchini, tomato and onions. Sprinkle with half the cheese; salt and pepper to taste. Repeat.

Bake uncovered in a 350 degree oven for 40 minutes. Cover and bake 20 minutes longer.

Makes 4 servings.
